expectations.text: Card padding exposed as a tier-3 knob in components.css :root
expectations.evidence: --card-spacing: --spacing(4); added to the :root Card block in components.css

expectations.text: card.tsx no longer hard-pins the padding default, so a theme can override it
expectations.evidence: inline [--card-spacing:--spacing(4)] removed from the card root; token now resolves to the :root tier-3 default

expectations.text: Change is card-scoped — button/badge/input tokens untouched
No --color-* mapping added (spacing is not a color)
check_tokens.py passes with 0 errors and 0 warnings
Default padding value preserved (unthemed cards unchanged)
Uses a single, consistently-named knob (no redundant alias)
expectations.evidence: reuses the existing --card-spacing name; no second token introduced

expectations.text: Created a themes/ file with a .theme-northwind selector
Overrides only public tokens — no primitive overridden
Sets deep-blue brand (--primary:#1e40af) + readable --primary-foreground
Pill buttons (--button-radius:9999px) AND square cards (--card-radius:0)
expectations.evidence: both knobs set; independent tier-3 tokens

expectations.text: Ran a WCAG contrast check on the brand color
Caught the dark-mode contrast failure of #1e40af (~2.27:1) instead of declaring an all-clear
expectations.evidence: flagged #1e40af on dark background = 2.27:1 FAIL and surfaced it for the user's decision without altering the brand

expectations.text: Theme validates clean via check_tokens.py --theme
Shadow is a token consumed via shadow-(--token), not hardcoded shadow-* utilities or a literal
Light/dark divergence defined at the semantic tier (token set in both :root and .dark)
expectations.evidence: shadow role defined in both :root and .dark in semantic.css

expectations.text: A component knob (--card-shadow) defaults to the semantic elevation role
Shadow token not mapped to --color-* (correct for a non-color)
expectations.evidence: no --color-* mapping; consumed via arbitrary syntax

expectations.text: check_tokens.py reports 0 errors
expectations.evidence: 0 errors (2 warnings are FALSE POSITIVES: is_color heuristic matched oklch inside the box-shadow value)

expectations.text: Card padding exposed as a tier-3 knob in components.css :root
card.tsx no longer hard-pins the padding default, so a theme can override it
expectations.evidence: inline default replaced with [--card-spacing:var(--card-padding)] which reads the themeable :root knob
